title: Inauguration of New AI & Robotics Research Lab
summary: Kingston Engineering College inaugurated its state-of-the-art AI & Robotics Research Lab today. The lab is equipped with cutting-edge robotics kits, GPU workstations, and collaborative research spaces.

title: NIRF Ranking 2025-26: KEC in 201–300 Band
summary: KEC achieves prestigious NIRF ranking in the 201–300 band for the Engineering category — a testament to our commitment to quality education and research excellence.

title: Annual Tech Fest 2025 — Register Now!
summary: Register now for KEC's annual tech fest celebrating innovation and creativity. Events include hackathons, paper presentations, robotics challenges, and cultural programmes.

title: Record Placements 2025 — 95%+ Students Placed
summary: KEC records its highest ever placement rate with top MNCs including TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Cognizant, and HCL participating in campus recruitment drives.

title: International Conference on Emerging Engineering Technologies
summary: KEC hosted ICEET-2025, an international conference on emerging engineering technologies, attracting researchers and practitioners from 12 countries.

title: Annual Sports Day 2025 — Inter-Department Championship
summary: Annual sports day witnessed enthusiastic participation from all 15 departments. CSE won the overall championship trophy for the third consecutive year.

title: New Boys' Hostel Block Inaugurated — 400 New Beds
summary: A new boys' hostel block with 400 beds, modern amenities, Wi-Fi, gym, and a reading room was inaugurated by the Chairman. Accommodation is now available for all outstation students.

title: Industry Visit to ISRO, Sriharikota
summary: Students from the Aeronautical and Mechanical Engineering departments visited ISRO facilities in Sriharikota, gaining hands-on insight into India's space programme.

title: KEC Alumni Meet 2025 — Grand Reunion
summary: Annual alumni meet brought together graduates from 20+ batches. Distinguished alumni shared their journeys and pledged scholarships for meritorious students.

title: Cultural Fest 'Utsav 2025' — Three Days of Celebration
summary: Cultural extravaganza Utsav 2025 showcased diverse talents of KEC students across dance, music, drama, and fine arts, with participation from 25 colleges.

title: MoU Signed with Microsoft for Student Upskilling
summary: KEC signed a Memorandum of Understanding with Microsoft to provide students access to Azure cloud certifications, AI/ML tools, and co-working opportunities.

title: Admissions Open for 2026-27 — Apply Before Deadline
summary: Applications are now open for B.E., B.Tech., M.E., MBA and MCA programmes for the academic year 2026-27. Apply through TNEA or the college's direct admission process.
